creator: @sethgolie
transcript: I'm starving, you wanna go to Chick-fil-A? Yeah, I'll get the 12-piece grilled nugget, a side mac and cheese, and then ask for a large bowl so I can mix it together, and then put buffalo sauce on top, and get a Coke Zero. Okay, that's pretty awesome, but what if we went there for breakfast? Yeah, I'll get the egg white grill with the extra grilled filet, a fruit cup, and a diet lemonade. Man, that's awesome, where did you even learn all that? Bro, are you not following Seth G yet? I'm gonna make sure to follow Seth G right now.
caption: Comment "FASTFOOD" for my FREE fast food cheat sheet. Steal these two Chick-fil-a orders to stay on track. Lunch order: 12 piece Grilled Nuggets + side Mac'n Cheese + buffalo sauce (mix together in bowl) + Coke Zero (495 calories 49 G protein). Breakfast order: Egg white grill + extra grilled filet + medium fruit cup + Diet Lemonade (520 calories 66 G protein). Follow @sethgolie for fast food swaps.
ocr_summary: Lunch: 1830 cal / 62g protein (original) vs 495 cal / 49g protein (swap). Breakfast: 1490 cal / 41g protein (original) vs 520 cal / 56g protein (swap). Caption says 66g protein for breakfast but OCR shows 56g.
